title: Hearts (Magenta)
description: Changes the HUD heart textures to be a nice magenta color.
body:
## Hearts (Magenta)
This resource pack changes the HUD heart textures to be a nice magenta color.

_If you want to support us and our work, please consider checking out [our similar resource packs](https://modrinth.com/collection/f4lHceTi) or all of [our resource packs](https://modrinth.com/organization/vanilla-collective)!_

<details>
<summary>Installation</summary>

To install this resource pack, select your Minecraft version in the download menu, and copy the downloaded file into Minecraft's `resourcepacks` folder. Alternatively, if you are using the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app), you can easily add this resource pack to an instance by selecting "Install with Modrinth App" in the download menu.

For more detailed installation instructions, see the [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Loading_a_resource_pack).

</details>

<details>
<summary>Screenshots</summary>

![Screenshot 1 demonstrating Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/q105XXIo/images/4bd8fb48c3ce01a6e6e72bf095593007c629a86c.png)
![Screenshot 2 demonstrating Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/q105XXIo/images/5c7d3907d2a86123eed06ce5c4b64da4e413ea0c.png)

</details>
